Who We Are

The Band You'll Want to Book Tonight

Music Pulse is a professional four-piece vocal and instrumental ensemble specialising in premium live entertainment for five-star hotels, luxury resorts, lounges, and upscale venues.

Based in the Philippines with 18 years of international performance experience across Malaysia, India, and China — we deliver sophisticated performances that elevate ambience while maintaining elegance and professionalism at every show.

The Ensemble

Meet the Artists

Vocalist & Pianist

Eya

A captivating vocalist and pianist who has graced the stages of five-star hotels and luxury lounges across Malaysia, India, and China for 18 years — her warm voice and elegant playing setting the perfect mood every night.

Vocals Piano Lounge

Lead Vocalist

Naomi

A powerhouse lead vocalist with 18 years of international stage experience across China, Malaysia, and India — delivering soulful ballads, jazz standards, and contemporary pop with effortless grace.

Vocals Ballads Soul

Vocalist & Guitarist

Kiko

A charismatic vocalist and guitarist who has refined his craft across 18 years on international stages — blending smooth vocals with polished guitar work across pop, OPM, jazz, and acoustic genres.

Vocals Guitar Multi-genre

Multi-Instrumentalist & Vocalist

Dee

A rare multi-instrumentalist vocalist with 18 years of international performance experience — playing piano, guitar, bass, and drums while singing, making every show seamlessly dynamic and full.

Vocals Piano Guitar
Where We Perform

We Fit Perfectly Into Your Venue

🏨

Five-Star Hotels

Lobby performances, grand ballrooms, and exclusive gala evenings for luxury hotel properties.

🌴

Beach Resorts

Sunset sets, poolside lounges, and outdoor terraces at premier resort destinations.

🍸

Rooftop Lounges

Intimate cocktail hours and evening entertainment for upscale bar and lounge venues.

🍽️

Fine Dining

Background ambience for Michelin-level dining experiences and upscale restaurant programs.

🥂

Corporate Events

Product launches, gala dinners, award ceremonies, and high-profile corporate gatherings.

✈️

International

Based in the Philippines, Music Pulse has performed together across Malaysia, India, and China for 18 years — available for international residencies and events worldwide.
